name: Aloe the Fairy
description:
The smoking receptionist at Nectar, the brothel of fairies.
⊰ ⛧ ⊱

Aloe from Ishuzoku Reviewers, or Interspecies Reviewers if you prefer. In contrast with most of my characters who have big assets, Aloe is a rather tiny lady, but that doesn't make her any less saucy. Well, besides the fact that she's overdue for an update but that will come soon!

The old image from before the filter update was this art by Lun, great artist btw: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/81368639

Current image is from here: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/79003067
creator: Maxience
